title: PutResponsesBatchRequest

questionResponses.description: Array of questions with their responses to update

allowEmptyStrings.description:
When it is true it allows setting empty string as value for verbatim/translation/transcription/notes fields. 
Otherwise empty string is ignored (i.e. it works like null value). By default it is false.

description: Request with inforamtion for updating multiple responses via one API call (batch operation)
